wins: Strong revenue growth across all businesses with 32% overall increase
Positive operating leverage in all 5 businesses and the firm overall
Significant capital return with $13.5 billion in share repurchases and dividend increases
Successful divestiture of Banamex stake and progress on international simplification
AI integration and operational transformation leading to improved efficiency and client experience
risks: Challenging macroeconomic environment with potential for slower growth
Commodities sector underperformance impacting fixed income revenues
Market volatility and potential for lower returns in certain segments
Regulatory uncertainties and ongoing compliance requirements
Potential for slower growth in retail services despite strong returns
